# Desire Ink Lab — Salem, OR
> Desire Ink Lab is a licensed tattoo studio in Salem, Oregon offering custom tattoos, cover-ups, and bilingual (English/Spanish) service. 2310 Commercial St SE. Call (503) 584-1626. Book a free consult. A South Commercial studio with weekday daytime appointments.

## Services
- Custom tattoos
- Cover-ups
- Fine-line & blackwork
- Flash & walk-ins

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97302)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 584-1626 · Hours: Mon–Fri 10am–6pm · Sat–Sun closed · Languages: English, Español
